headline: TOP RATED
title: Over 150,000 stars of prompt brilliance.
subtitle: The internet's most beloved prompt collection, now a full app. Search, save, and share prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — or self-host it for your team with total privacy.

headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: Your AI workforce, deployed in 60 seconds.
subtitle: CrewClaw turns agent deployment from a weekend project into a one-click moment. Choose from 103 battle-tested templates, plug into Telegram or Slack, and your digital employees are live.

headline: RISING STAR
title: Give your Mac room to breathe again.
subtitle: DodoTidy is the native macOS cleaner that actually understands your disk — surfacing hidden caches, bloated logs, and junk files, then trash-deleting them safely so you never lose what matters.

headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: See inside every request, in real time.
subtitle: Hono Telescope drops a live dashboard into your Node.js or Bun app with one middleware line — inspect requests, stack traces, and database queries without ever leaving your browser.
